_comment: Template for the `polkadotTestnet` genesis config. Copy this file to genesis-testnet.json (gitignored) and fill it in before running `npm run deploy:univerify:testnet`. Each `account` must be the H160 that pallet-revive's AccountId32Mapper derives for the university's real Polkadot SS58 account (keccak256(pubkey)[-20:]). When the university signs from PWAllet / Polkadot.js, pallet-revive will present that exact H160 as msg.sender. The _ss58Mapping block is informational — it records which SS58 each H160 came from so deployments stay auditable. metadataHash should be the keccak256 of the institution's off-chain metadata document (DID doc, IPFS CID, etc.), or 0x00..00 if none. approvalThreshold must satisfy 1 <= threshold <= issuers.length.
